effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: I'll guide you to the illusion that you wish to see.

effectEN:
[CONT][Hand]:While you are paying the cost for Stride, this card may be discarded as a grade 3.
[ACT][Hand]:If you have a "Chronojet Dragon" crest, COST  [discard this card], search your deck or drop for up to one grade 3 card with "Chronojet" in its card name, reveal it and put it into your hand, and if you searched your deck, shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: The demonic dragon of fog followed. A journey through time, until the end.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed by riding from "Chrono Dran", draw a card, and you get a "Chronojet Dragon" crest.
flavorTextEN: A ray of light cuts through time and space, towards a distant future.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a "Chronojet Dragon" crest, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], draw a card, and if this unit was placed by your card's ability, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: What she loved was the vivid tomorrow she could see beyond.

nameEN: Song of Extolment Can Be Heard
effectEN:
Play this card if you have a vanguard with "Kheios" in its card name!
Choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn. Choose three normal units from your drop, put them into your soul, and put this card on the bottom of your deck.
flavorTextEN: Extol your desires.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your soul has five or more cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: In the deep night when all are asleep, the demon wanders in search of a sacrifice.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your unit was placed on (RC) from soul this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000. (Includes this unit)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if you have no other rear-guards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose an "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon" on your (VC), and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: As I will! My fury shall pierce through!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [put another rear-guard into your soul], look at the top card of your deck, and call it to (RC) or put it into your soul.
flavorTextEN: My play, shall numb you to the very bones!

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if any player's rear-guard was put on the bottom of their deck this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[CONT](RC) Generation Break 1 (Active if you have one or more face up G units in total on your (VC) or G zone):This unit gets "Intercept", and can intercept from the back row.
flavorTextEN: Generation Stride that is said to bring out one's hidden potential... That was the great power that lies beyond the accumulated present.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle. If your hand has two or more cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: According to ancient lore, there was no mystery she could not solve.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from soul, until end of turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000, and "[AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, COST  [put this unit into your soul], and draw a card.".
flavorTextEN: A gorgeous singing voice provides yet another layer of color to the circus.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is put into your drop from soul during your turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to the back row (RC) in the same column as your front row unit with "Rarami" in its card name.
[Glitter]-"Tamayura" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Tamayura" in its card name)
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, put all of your rear-guards in the same column as this unit into your soul. If you put a unit with "Rarami" in its card name into your soul with this effect, and you did not Counter Charge this turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and Counter Charge (1). (Putting cards into soul is mandatory)
flavorTextEN: Let's make this bloom as the greatest show!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is put into your drop from soul during your turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to the back row (RC) in the same column as your front row unit with "Ririmi" in its card name.
[Glitter]-"Tamayura" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Tamayura" in its card name)
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, put all of your rear-guards in the same column as this unit into your soul. If you put a unit with "Ririmi" in its card name into your soul with this effect, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. (Putting cards into soul is mandatory)
flavorTextEN: It's the start of the greatest show!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle your vanguard with "Baromagnes" in its card name attacked, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & retire this unit], choose ten cards from your soul, and return the rest of all cards from your soul to your deck and shuffle it.
flavorTextEN: Shape up. I'll help.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on a back row (RC) from soul, if you have a vanguard with "Luquier" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets "[CONT](VC):All of your front row rear-guards get [Power]+5000." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Time does not change the invigoration brought forth by the sparkling flames.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put into your soul from (RC), if your damage zone has four or more face down cards, COST  [bind this card], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: A treasure that can be easily obtained holds no value. Isn't that right?

effectEN: [AUTO][Soul]:When your grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Greedon" in its card name attacks, COST  [bind one other "Desire Devil, Heekou" from your soul as face up], and call this card to a back row (RC).
flavorTextEN: Those who look wicked are mostly friends.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put into your soul from (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and put this card into your hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, choose one of the units this unit boosted, and until end of turn, it gets [AUTO](VC/RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, choose up to two cards from your drop, and put them into your soul.".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: I'll hit it with delayed shots!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from your soul, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Gears approaching from outside your consciousness... There's no easy way to avoid them.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon "Almajestar, Turan゠Dyna", Soul Charge (2), if the Critical Trigger is Soul Charged, draw a card.
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Bind one trigger unit from your soul], this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of the turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Fallen of the Dragontree, Demon Sheriruth
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your (RC) without any Dragontree markers, and put a Dragontree marker.
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose a grade 1 or less card from your soul, call it to (RC) in the same column as this unit.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your (RC) without any Dragontree markers, and put a Dragontree marker.
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose a grade 1 or less card from your soul, call it to a (RC) in the same column as this unit.
flavorTextEN: A fallen spawn of the Dragontree. Communication is impossible; there is only rejection and negation.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if you have a vanguard with "Almajestar" in its card name, choose up to one trigger unit from your hand or drop, and put it into soul. If you put a card from your hand, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: With this, we're one step closer to our dream.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your unit was placed on (RC) from soul this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000. (Includes this unit)
flavorTextEN: Reap the radience out of life.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put from (RC) into your soul by the ability of your vanguard with "Greedon" in its card name, choose one of your vanguards, and you may have it get [Power]+15000 until end of turn. If you do, that unit gets drive -1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is put into your drop from soul during your turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to the back row (RC) in the same column as your front row unit with "Rarami" in its card name.
[Glitter]-"Tamayura" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Tamayura" in its card name)
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, put all of your rear-guards in the same column as this unit into your soul. If you put a unit with "Rarami" in its card name into your soul with this effect, and you did not Counter Charge this turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and Counter Charge (1). (Putting cards into soul is mandatory)
flavorTextEN: Let's make this bloom as the greatest show!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Let's come out! Go! Go! Diabolos!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if this unit is on a (RC) with a Dragontree marker, Soul Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have a vanguard with "Almajestar" in its card name, COST  [retire this unit], choose up to two [Critical] triggers from your bind zone, and put them into your soul.
flavorTextEN: Now again, engrave these stars.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When you Soul Blast (3) or more cards at the same time for the cost of your vanguard's ability, look at the top card of your deck, put it on the top of the deck or into the soul, and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT]:This card cannot be ridden.
[AUTO](RC):If you did not Soul Blast (3) or more cards at the same time for the cost of your card's ability this turn, this unit cannot attack nor boost.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your "Karmic Demonic Jewel Dragon, Drajeweled Masques" is placed on (VC), COST  [put this unit into soul], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This is the shape of the future I believe in!

effectEN: [AUTO](Soul):When you play a normal order, you may call this card to (RC). If you called, choose a card from your soul, and put it into drop.
flavorTextEN: All weight becomes inferior before her.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC/GC/Soul):If your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this card gets grade +2.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your soul has a grade 3 card, you may Soul Charge (1). If a grade 3 card was Soul Charge with this effect, choose a grade 3 card from your drop, and put it into soul.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Greedon" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a card with "Desire Devil" in its card name from your drop, put it into the soul, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your vanguard is "Master of Gravity, Baromagnes", COST  [discard a card from your hand], this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle, and if your soul has ten or more cards, Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, Soul Charge (1).
[ACT](Soul): COST  [Counter Blast (1) and put this card into drop], Soul Charge (1), choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power] +10000 until end of turn.

[CONT](RC):If you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000, and if this unit [Stand] this turn by a card effect, [Critical]+1.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: I too, am a point getter of the team!

effectEN:
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your units with "Diabolos" in its card name, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you are in "Final Rush", your opponent cannot intercept until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The energetic quarterback.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (1)], until end of turn, your opponent cannot intercept, and if you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000, and when this unit would attack, it battles all of your opponent's units in a column.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, Soul Charge (1), and if your vanguard is "Diabolos, "Violence" Bruce", choose up to one card from your soul, and call it to an open (RC).
flavorTextEN: Penetrating straight across the field, even after taking on the opponent's full power.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your vanguard is "Diabolos, "Violence" Bruce", COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), COST  [put a rear-guard into your soul], and draw a card.
[CONT](RC):If you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: A glimpse of wit amidst violence. The second son churns out victories with his intellect.

effectEN: [ACT](Soul):If your soul has ten or more cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Master of Gravity, Baromagnes", COST  [put a card from your hand into your soul], draw a card, and Soul Charge (1).
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and Soul Charge (2).
flavorTextEN: Voltage: maximum. Electrification: lethal.
Supernatural powers are now also considered to be part of one's talent.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], Soul Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. If you have three or more other rear-guards, it gets +10000 instead of +5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](Front Row RC):When your vanguard is placed, Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, Soul Charge (1).
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, if your soul has ten or more cards, COST  [put this unit into your soul], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Hey! Stop moving around while it's hardening!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):This unit cannot be chosen by your opponent's card effects.
flavorTextEN: Pretend you didn't see anything! It’s a promise with big sister, okay!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you Soul Charge this turn, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: The public tends to seek vans and circuses regardless of the era.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your soul has five or more cards, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Shoot at the pile that sticks out...did I get it wrong?

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, Soul Charge (1).
[ACT](Soul): COST  [Counter Blast (1) and put this card into your drop], Soul Charge (1), choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power] +10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Don't go burning out on me, alright? 'cause this ain't anywhere near max firepower yet!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", COST  [put a card from your hand into your soul], search your deck for a card with the same card name as this card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](Soul):During your turn, if your damage zone has four or more cards, the "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon" on your (VC) gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Without care or concern, it consumes all.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your vanguard is "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (2)], choose a card from your soul, and call it to (RC).
[AUTO](RC):When your vanguard attacks, if you persona rode this turn, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Those who lost to the demonic dragon have their appearance changed into Desire Devils.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (1)], until end of turn, your opponent cannot intercept, and if you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: The key to victory is not to give your opponent the freedom of action.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is "Master of Gravity, Baromagnes", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose any number of normal units from your soul, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for each card chosen. Return all of the chosen cards to your deck and shuffle it. (Ride deck cards return to the ride deck)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], Soul Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. If you have three or more other rear-guards, [Power]+10000 instead of +5000.
flavorTextEN: Experienced wildmasters can control the pack with a snap of the whip.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When you Soul Charge by your card's ability, if you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The destination of these blades... I wonder, where will it be?

effectEN:
[CONT](GC):If your soul has seven or more cards, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (GC), you may put this card into your soul.
flavorTextEN: The loss of magical powers must be supressed to the minimum.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put a rear-guard into your soul], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards for every four cards in your soul, and retire it. Then, if you are in "Final Rush", look at the same number of cards from the top of your deck as the number of your opponent's open (RC), choose any number of unit cards from among them, call them to (RC), and put the rest into your soul.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, until end of turn, this unit gets [Power]+2000, and if you are in "Final Rush", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: Of course, you can make the decision now, right?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put from (RC) into your soul by your vanguard's ability, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Aiming for a one-shot, complete turnabout from the brink.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your soul has seven or more cards, all of your opponent's rear-guards in same column as this unit lose "Boost" and "Intercept", and cannot gain those skills.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put a rear-guard into your soul], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards for every four cards in your soul, and retire it. Then, if you are in "Final Rush", look at the same number of cards from the top of your deck as the number of your opponent's open (RC), choose any number of unit cards from among them, call them to (RC), and put the rest into your soul.
flavorTextEN: This is the greatest chance, to reverse everything.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) during your main phase, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top card of your deck, and call it to (RC). At the end of that turn, retire that called unit.
flavorTextEN: Hehehe! There's a smell of sweet juice!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), perform all of the effects below according to the number of cards in your soul.
•7 or more - COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand], choose a card from your soul, put it into your hand, and Soul Charge (1).
•13 or more - All of your front row units get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your soul has seven or more cards, all of your opponent's rear-guards in same column as this unit loses "Intercept" and "Boost", and cannot get them.
flavorTextEN: Not just itself. Everything within its vision will be degenerated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have five or more units, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. If your damage zone has six cards, it gets +15000 instead of +5000.
flavorTextEN: Beyond the horizon of death. That is the true gambling house.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Then, if you are in "Final Rush", Soul Charge (2), choose a card from your soul, and call it to an open (RC).
flavorTextEN: I won't let anyone stop this strike of mine―!

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your soul has two or more grade 3 cards, COST  [discard a card from your hand], and this unit gets [Power]+15000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Do your best when you do it. To the fullest.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, Soul Charge (2). If you are in "Final Rush", choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you have five or more cards in your soul, this unit gets [Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)

Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (4)]!
Choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle for each card in your damage zone.
flavorTextEN: A primitive craving is greater than anything.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your soul has two or more grade 3 cards, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is "Master of Gravity, Baromagnes", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose any number of normal units from your soul, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for each card chosen. Return all of the chosen cards to your deck and shuffle it. (Cards from the ride deck are returned to the ride deck face up)
flavorTextEN: With a flash from the gleaming demonic claws, life and death reverses.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your vanguard is "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (2)], choose a card from your soul, and call it to (RC).
[AUTO](RC):When your vanguard attacks, if you persona rode this turn, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Those who lost to the demonic dragon have their appearance changed into Desire Devils.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put from (RC) into your soul by your vanguard's ability, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Aiming for a one-shot, complete turnabout from the brink.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you have five or more cards in your soul, this unit gets [Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: I wonder if your sword will reach me.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, if your soul has seven or more cards, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Enticing with the sweet poison---

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), perform all of the effects below according to the number of cards in your soul.
•7 or more - COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand], choose a card from your soul, put it into your hand, and Soul Charge (1).
•13 or more - All of your front row units get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: All kinds of protection are null in front of him.

nameEN: Gear Eland Clad in Swirling Thunder
effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your soul has two or more grade 3 cards, COST  [discard a card from your hand], and this unit gets [Power]+15000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Give it your all when the time comes. As much as you can.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, Soul Charge (2). If you are in "Final Rush", choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Fists fly, cheers erupt. A match brings heat, and makes everything go faster.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your soul has two or more grade 3 cards, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Will you try to overcome the wall of sound?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, if your soul has five or more cards, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: All you need to do is stop the momentum. Just like this!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a rear-guard with "Rarami" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and your opponent puts that unit into their soul.
[Glitter]-"Tamayura" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Tamayura" in its card name)
[AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (GC), you may put this card into your soul.
flavorTextEN:
Tonight, at this moment of prosperity,
allow me to show you colorful dreams.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a rear-guard with "Ririmi" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and draw a card.
[Glitter]-"Tamayura" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Tamayura" in its card name)
[AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (GC), you may put this card into your soul.
flavorTextEN:
Under the stained cotton roof,
allow me to show you colorless dreams.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, you may Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Keep your eyes on the box, okay? Three, two, one......!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Approaching Fangs, Kheios", Soul Charge (1). If the Soul Charge card was a trigger unit, draw a card, and if it was normal unit, choose up to one card from your soul, and call it to (RC).
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: Mercy and compassion to all fools.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), reveal the top card of your deck, and if your soul has no cards with the same card name as the revealed card, Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], draw a card, choose a card from your hand, and put it into your soul. Then, if your soul has eight or more cards with different card names, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. If your soul has ten or more cards with different card names, it gets +10000 instead of +5000.
flavorTextEN: Just stay frozen over there and watch.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+10000 until the end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), reveal the top card of your deck, if your soul has no cards with the same card name as the revealed card, Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: At the tip of the arrow, discover the form of the future that you desire.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your soul has five or more cards, choose one of your other units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: An alluring shine as though the soul is aflame.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+10000 until the end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Do you want to know why I am known as the battering ram?
